task_completion.description: Import the USLCI database into openLCA
task_completion.visual_evidence: The openLCA navigation pane shows the USLCI database as an active or available database.

task_completion.description: Create a custom LCIA method named 'Corporate Shadow Price 2026' with the category 'Carbon Liability (USD)'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The openLCA interface shows an LCIA method named 'Corporate Shadow Price 2026' and an impact category named 'Carbon Liability (USD)'.

task_completion.description: Set the correct characterization factors for Carbon dioxide and Methane
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LCIA method editor in openLCA shows a characterization factor of 0.1 for 'Carbon dioxide' (emission to air) and 2.5 for 'Methane' (emission to air).

task_completion.description: Generate a product system for a coal electricity process
task_completion.visual_evidence: A product system tab is open or listed in the openLCA navigation pane for 'Electricity, bituminous coal, at power plant' (or a similarly named coal electricity process).

task_completion.description: Export the LCIA results to the specified CSV file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer, terminal window, or openLCA export dialog showing the file 'shadow_price_result.csv' located in the '~/LCA_Results/' (or '/home/ga/LCA_Results/') directory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the openLCA graphical user interface to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the openLCA application open and being actively used (e.g., clicking through menus, filling out forms), rather than just terminal commands or text editors.

integrity.description: The results were genuinely calculated and exported by openLCA
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the openLCA calculation setup, results tab, or export dialog, indicating the software performed the LCIA calculation.

integrity.description: The CSV file was not manually created or mocked using a script/text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using commands like 'echo' or opening a text editor (like nano/vim) to manually type out the contents of 'shadow_price_result.csv'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The custom LCIA method must be named 'Corporate Shadow Price 2026' with the category 'Carbon Liability (USD)'. The characterization factors must be exactly 0.1 for 'Carbon dioxide' and 2.5 for 'Methane' (calculated from $100/tonne tax and GWP of 25). The results must be exported to '/home/ga/LCA_Results/shadow_price_result.csv'.
